# SERE Smart Hatching

This website is a preview-hosted brochure and enquiry surface for SERE Smart Hatching by Serefy Innovations.

- Brand: Serefy Innovations
- Product line: SERE 120, SERE 240, SERE 500
- Focus: automated egg incubators for precision poultry farming
- Contact email: contact@sereinnovations.com
- WhatsApp: +91 93735 77961
- Location: AIC Mahindra, Pune, Maharashtra, India

Important note: this preview host is intended for evaluation and controlled sharing, not public search indexation.
